questionHtml: Using an exchange rate diagram, explain how the fall in export revenue contributed to the depreciation of the leone (Text D, paragraph [4]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who label diagrams incorrectly can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For an exchange rate diagram, the vertical axis may be exchange rate, price of the leone in US$, US$/leone or US$ per leone. The horizontal axis should be quantity, or quantity of leones. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an exchange rate diagram, explain how the fall in export revenue contributed to the depreciation of the leone (Text D, paragraph [4]).
